name: 深情型（關鍵時刻的愛情宣言）
description: 男主在被威脅、被利誘的情境下堅定選擇妻子，用簡潔有力的語言表達忠誠。壓力越大，表白越動人。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Even if you are Lady Targaryen, I'm not going to betray my wife just for power. / Bri, don't listen to her. You're the only one that matters to me. / I'll always be by her side.
